overview.description: AI-powered sales assistant chatbot for e-commerce stores
overview.description_long: ROBOSALES.AI is an AI-powered conversational sales assistant designed for e-commerce stores. It provides personalized product recommendations through intelligent, real-time conversations, helps customers find products matching their preferences, and delivers analytics on customer interactions. Offers a Sales Module and a Customer Care Module as SaaS subscriptions. Registered in Prague, primarily targeting US and UK online retailers.
overview.tagline: Personal Sales Assistant For Your Online Store

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague; targets US and UK e-commerce stores with an AI conversational sales assistant. First blog post dated January 2025; first pilot with Sportega.ie sporting goods store.

key_milestones.event: First product launch with Sportega.ie as early pilot customer
Published first public case study on AI sales assistant learnings (Sep 2025)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: ROBOSALES.AI is a conversational chatbot layer over LLMs for e-commerce product recommendations — a use case that foundation models (GPT, Claude, Gemini) with standard RAG over product catalogs can replicate with minimal effort. No proprietary training data or deep technical moat is evident.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: E-commerce AI assistant market is real and growing, with paying customers (Sportega.ie), but the space is highly competitive with many incumbents (Intercom, Drift, Tidio) and large platforms (Shopify, Salesforce) adding native AI chat. Pricing of $1,000–$2,000/month is accessible but not differentiated.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known funding rounds, very early-stage startup (launched 2024–2025) with a small team. No runway signals found; bootstrapped Czech startup targeting US market creates additional execution risk.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Combination of thin AI moat (chatbot over commodity LLM APIs), intense competition in the e-commerce chatbot space, and no known funding makes this a high-risk company. Early-stage with only one publicly named customer.

metadata.notes: Company is registered at Panská 854/2, 110 00 Praha per CNAIP listing. Despite Prague HQ, website and marketing is entirely US/UK focused with a Dallas TX phone number. CEO identified as Alex Karo from blog byline. Muzamal Hussain linked via LinkedIn share button in blog article. Founded year estimated as 2024 based on first blog post in Jan 2025.
